home.title: Imported wellness, with the expiry shown before you buy
home.subtitle: Veeey imports premium dietary supplements and health devices directly from the USA, UK & EU. Free nationwide shipping, UltraFast 3–6h delivery in Greater Cairo.
home.comingSoon: The new Veeey storefront is being built — phase by phase.

common.slugAutoHint: Leave blank to auto-generate from the English name.

hero.title: Premium health, with nothing to hide.
hero.subtitle: Every product shows its expiry date before you buy.

expiryPricing.title: Choose your expiry, choose your price
expiryPricing.subtitle: Same product, different lots. Pick the shelf life that fits your routine — and pay accordingly.

expiryPricing.legend: Select an expiry date and price

specialOrder.title: Can't find it? We'll bring it.
specialOrder.subtitle: If it's sold abroad, we can source it for you — authentic, tracked, and on a fixed timeline.
specialOrder.tellDesc: Share a link or a name — any brand.
specialOrder.reserveDesc: We lock your price and start sourcing.
specialOrder.flyTitle: We buy & fly it to Egypt
specialOrder.flyDesc: Direct from the USA, UK & EU in ~20 days.

specialOrderForm.title: Request a special order
specialOrderForm.intro: Can't find it? Tell us what you need and we'll source it for you — authentic, tracked, and on a fixed timeline.
specialOrderForm.terms: Special orders are reserved with a {percent}% deposit and typically arrive within about {days} days; we back the delivery date with our compensation policy.
specialOrderForm.name: Your name
specialOrderForm.photosHint: Attach photos of the product or its label if you have them.
specialOrderForm.loggedInContact: We'll use your account contact details ({name}).
specialOrderForm.submittedNote: Thank you — our team will contact you shortly to confirm the price and timeline.
specialOrderForm.error: Please check your details and try again.
specialOrderForm.errPhone: Please enter a valid phone: Egyptian 01XXXXXXXXX or international (+…).

membership.title: Membership that rewards label-readers
membership.subtitle: Earn points on everything you buy, and unlock more the longer you stay.

testimonials.title: Trusted by label-readers
testimonials.quote1: Finally a store that shows the expiry before I pay. I ordered at 9am and the courier was at my door by lunch.
testimonials.quote2: They special-ordered a brand I couldn't find anywhere in Egypt. Sealed, authentic, and exactly on the date they promised.
testimonials.quote3: The pharmacist actually called to check the dosage was right for me. That kind of care is rare.

blog.title: Medical insights from our pharmacists
blog.title1: How to read a supplement label like a pharmacist
blog.excerpt1: Dosage, bioavailability, and the fine print that actually matters.
blog.title2: Does expiry date really change a supplement's potency?
blog.excerpt2: What shelf life means for vitamins, omegas, and minerals.

disclaimer.title: A quick note
disclaimer.body: Dietary supplements are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Consult your physician or pharmacist before use, especially if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication. Veeey's pharmacists are here to help.

buyBox.preorderNote: Not in stock right now — reserve it with a 25% deposit and we'll special-order it for you.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.errGeneric: Please check your details and try again.
checkout.errVerify: Please verify your phone or email below before placing the order.
checkout.errBlocked: This account cannot place orders. Please contact support.
checkout.errStale: Your points balance or coupon changed while you were checking out. No order was placed and nothing was charged — please refresh to see the updated total.
checkout.errStock: Your cart’s stock hold expired or an item is no longer available. No order was placed — please return to your cart and add the items again.
checkout.verifyHint: We’ll send a 6-digit code to confirm your contact — one time only; verified accounts skip this next time.
checkout.verifyEnterPhone: Enter your phone number above first
checkout.verifyDone: Contact verified — you can place your order.
checkout.verifyBadCode: That code is not right or has expired. Try again or resend.
checkout.verifyRateLimited: Too many codes requested. Please wait a few minutes.
checkout.verifyBadDestination: That phone/email does not look valid.
checkout.verifySendFailed: We could not send the code. Please try again.
checkout.verifyNote: Verification above is required before the order goes through.
checkout.discountsNote: Discounts are applied to your total on the next step.
checkout.noVat: No VAT. You can pay cash on delivery.

cart.outOfStock: Sorry — we couldn't add that item: not enough stock is available right now.
cart.title: Your cart

confirmation.placed: Your order {number} is placed. Our pharmacist will confirm it shortly.
confirmation.paymentPending: We are confirming your payment. This page will update once it is settled.
confirmation.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled — your order is reserved but not yet paid.
confirmation.awaitingLead: Order {number} is reserved but not yet paid.
confirmation.paymentNotStarted: The payment could not be started. Nothing was charged — please try again.
confirmation.paymentAwaiting: We have not received your payment yet. If you just paid, this page will update shortly.
confirmation.autoCancelNote: Unpaid orders are cancelled automatically after {minutes} minutes and the items are released.
confirmation.cancelledUnpaid: This order was cancelled because the payment was not completed. Nothing was charged.
